title: Recruiter Operational Facts
summary: Concise operational facts for recruiter screening and follow-up.
claims: Joz has more than 13 years of international product, engineering, innovation, and transformation experience.
His AI/ML-related work developed through ML-enabled product and experience work and now focuses directly on Agentic AI architecture.
He has extensive Singapore and APAC work experience and is open to Singapore/APAC opportunities.

Portfolio and Agentic AI CV: meetjoz.com.
years_ai_ml: AI/ML-related work since enterprise ML UX initiatives; direct Agentic AI architecture focus in recent years
